description: AGENT-EUDR-023: Legal Compliance Verifier Agent -- country legal frameworks registry, compliance document verification, certification validation (FSC/PEFC/RSPO/RA/ISCC), red flag detection and alerting, compliance assessments across 8 EUDR Article 2(40) categories, third-party audit tracking, country compliance rule sets, batch processing, legal opinion management, and EUDR legal compliance reporting

panels.title: Legal Frameworks Registered
panels.description: Total number of country legal frameworks currently registered in the system across all 8 legislation categories

panels.title: Documents Verified
panels.description: Total compliance documents verified across all suppliers and document types

panels.title: Unresolved Red Flags
panels.description: Current count of unresolved red flag alerts requiring attention. Alert fires when count exceeds 20.

panels.title: Compliance Score
panels.description: Average legal compliance score across all assessed suppliers. Thresholds: <60 red, 60-80 yellow, >80 green.

panels.title: Framework Registrations Over Time
panels.description: Rate of legal framework registrations segmented by legislation category

panels.title: Document Verifications by Type
panels.description: Compliance document verifications broken down by document type (land_title, forest_permit, environmental_license, etc.)

panels.title: Certification Validations by Scheme
panels.description: Certification validations segmented by scheme (FSC, PEFC, RSPO, RA, ISCC, etc.)

panels.title: Red Flags by Severity
panels.description: Red flag detections over time broken down by severity level. Alert: critical red flags > 5/hour triggers immediate escalation.

alert.name: EUDR-LCV Critical Red Flags Rate
alert.message: Critical legal compliance red flags exceed 5/hour threshold. Immediate investigation required for EUDR compliance.

panels.title: Unresolved Red Flags Trend
panels.description: Trend of unresolved red flags over time with severity breakdown. Alert fires when total exceeds 20.

alert.name: EUDR-LCV Unresolved Red Flags Threshold
alert.message: Unresolved legal compliance red flags exceed 20. Remediation backlog growing beyond acceptable limit.

panels.title: Red Flags by Category
panels.description: Distribution of red flags across the 6 detection categories: document irregularity, certification gap, legal non-compliance, sanctions match, corruption indicator, deforestation link

panels.title: Assessments by Status
panels.description: Compliance assessment outcomes over time segmented by status: compliant, partially_compliant, non_compliant, remediation_required

panels.title: Active Suppliers Monitored
panels.description: Number of unique suppliers currently being monitored for legal compliance

panels.title: Processing Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)
panels.description: Processing duration distribution by operation. Shows p50, p95, and p99 percentiles. Alert: p99 > 5s indicates performance degradation.

alert.name: EUDR-LCV p99 Latency Threshold
alert.message: p99 processing latency exceeds 5 seconds. Performance degradation detected in legal compliance verifier pipeline.

panels.title: Error Rate by Operation
panels.description: Error rate across all legal compliance verifier operations. Alert: error rate > 1% triggers notification for investigation.

alert.name: EUDR-LCV Error Rate Threshold
alert.message: Legal compliance verifier error rate exceeds 1%. Investigate failing operations immediately.

panels.title: Compliance Score Distribution
panels.description: Distribution of legal compliance scores (0-100) across all assessed suppliers. Threshold: <60 non_compliant, 60-79 partially_compliant, >=80 compliant.

panels.title: Compliance Reports Generated
panels.description: Rate of compliance reports generated over time, segmented by report type

panels.title: Batch Operations Status
panels.description: Batch processing operations status distribution: running, completed, failed, partially_completed

panels.title: API Request Rate by Endpoint & Status
panels.description: API request throughput for the Legal Compliance Verifier agent, segmented by endpoint path and HTTP status code

panels.title: Document Expiry Monitoring
panels.description: Count of compliance documents by validity status: valid, expiring within 30/60/90 days, expired, revoked

panels.title: Compliance Score Trend
panels.description: Average legal compliance score over time. Alert fires when score drops below 60, indicating systemic legal compliance failures.

alert.name: EUDR-LCV Compliance Score Below Threshold
alert.message: Average legal compliance score has dropped below 60. Systemic compliance failure detected across supply chains.

panels.title: Alert Rules Reference
panels.description: Summary of all alert rules configured for the Legal Compliance Verifier agent

options.content:
## EUDR-023 Legal Compliance Verifier Alert Rules

| Alert | Condition | Severity | Evaluation |
|-------|-----------|----------|------------|
| **Critical Red Flags Rate** | Critical red flags > 5/hour | Critical | Every 1m, for 5m |
| **p99 Latency Threshold** | p99 processing latency > 5s | Warning | Every 1m, for 5m |
| **Error Rate Threshold** | Error rate > 1% | Warning | Every 1m, for 5m |
| **Unresolved Red Flags** | Unresolved red flags > 20 | Warning | Every 5m, for 10m |
| **Compliance Score Drop** | Avg compliance score < 60 | Critical | Every 5m, for 15m |

### Notification Channels
- **Critical**: PagerDuty + Slack #eudr-critical
- **Warning**: Slack #eudr-alerts + Email on-call

### Runbook Links
- [Legal Compliance Red Flag Response](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/lcv/red-flag-response)
- [Document Verification Failure](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/lcv/doc-verify-failure)
- [Certification Validation Issues](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/lcv/cert-validation)
- [Performance Degradation](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/lcv/perf-degradation)
- [Compliance Score Recovery](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/lcv/compliance-recovery)

title: EUDR Legal Compliance Verifier (EUDR-023)
